revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「'''「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧'''（ひょうのつくにほんれっとうのこふんいちらん）とする本項では、名称に「瓢」（ひょう/ひさご）が付く[[日本列島]]の[[古墳時代]]の[[古墳]]および[[古墳群]]について一覧化する。 ==概要== [[日本列島]]には「瓢箪塚」（ひょうたんづか/ひさごづか）や「瓢箪山」（ひょうたんやま/ひさごやま）を…」
revision.text:
'''「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧'''（ひょうのつくにほんれっとうのこふんいちらん）とする本項では、名称に「瓢」（ひょう/ひさご）が付く[[日本列島]]の[[古墳時代]]の[[古墳]]および[[古墳群]]について一覧化する。
==概要== [[日本列島]]には「瓢箪塚」（ひょうたんづか/ひさごづか）や「瓢箪山」（ひょうたんやま/ひさごやま）を冠する古墳が数多く存在し、これ以外にも「瓢塚（ひょうづか/ひさごづか）」や「ひさご塚」・「ひさご山」など、「瓢」以下が異なるものや「瓢」を[[平仮名]]で書くものなど、様々な[[バリエーション]]が存在する。この名称は、[[前方後円墳]]または[[前方後方墳]]を側面から見た形状が[[瓢箪]]（ひさご/ひょうたん）に見立てられたことに由来するとされる。
==瓢箪山古墳== {{main|瓢箪山古墳}} *[[駒岡瓢箪山古墳]]（こまおかひょうたんやまこふん） - [[神奈川県]][[横浜市]][[鶴見区 (横浜市)|鶴見区]]。[[駒岡古墳群]]の1基。 *[[瓢箪山古墳 (函南町)|瓢箪山古墳（函南町）]]（ひょうたんやまこふん）- [[静岡県]][[田方郡]][[函南町]]。 * [[守山瓢箪山古墳]]（もりやまひょうたんやまこふん）- [[愛知県]][[名古屋市]][[守山区]]。 * [[安土瓢箪山古墳]]（あづちひょうたんやまこふん）- [[滋賀県]][[近江八幡市]]。 * [[山畑古墳群|瓢箪山古墳（東大阪市）]]（ひょうたんやまこふん）- [[大阪府]][[東大阪市]]。[[山畑古墳群]]の1基。 * [[佐紀瓢箪山古墳]]（さきひょうたんやまこふん）- [[奈良県]][[奈良市]]。[[佐紀盾列古墳群]]の1基。
==瓢箪塚古墳== {{main|瓢箪塚古墳}} *[[瓢箪塚古墳 (真岡市)]]（ひょうたんづかこふん）- [[栃木県]][[真岡市]]。 *小森瓢箪塚古墳（こもりひょうたんづかこふん）-[[千葉県]][[白井市]]{{Sfn|高花|2005}}。 *[[山崎ひょうたん塚古墳]]（やまのさきひょうたんづかこふん）-[[千葉県]][[佐倉市]]。 * [[瓢箪塚古墳 (海老名市)]]（ひさごづかこふん） - [[神奈川県]][[海老名市]]。上浜田古墳群の1基。 *[[小平沢古墳|ひょうたん塚]]-[[山梨県]][[甲府市]]。[[小平沢古墳]]（こびらさわこふん）の別名。 * [[瓢箪塚古墳 (静岡市)]]（ひょうたんづかこふん） - [[静岡県]][[静岡市]][[清水区]]。西ノ原古墳群の1基。
==その他== {{main|瓢塚古墳}} *[[瓢塚古墳 (掛川市)]] - [[静岡県]][[掛川市]]。 * [[白水瓢塚古墳]] - [[兵庫県]][[神戸市]]。 * [[丁瓢塚古墳]]（よろひさごづかこふん）- 兵庫県[[姫路市]]。丁古墳群の1基。 *[[瓢山古墳]]（ひさごやまこふん）- [[広島県]][[庄原市]]。 * [[ひさご塚古墳 (観音寺市)]]- [[香川県]][[観音寺市]]。 * [[瓢塚古墳 (唐津市)]]- [[佐賀県]][[唐津市]]。 * [[ひさご塚古墳]]- [[長崎県]][[東彼杵郡]][[東彼杵町]]。
==脚注== {{Reflist}}
==参考文献== *{{Cite book|和書|first=宏行|last=高花|title=千葉県白井市市内遺跡調査報告書（小森瓢箪塚古墳）|year=2005|date=2005-03-24|url=https://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/ja/57027|series=白井市文化財基礎調査報告書4|publisher=白井市教育委員会|ref=harv}}
==関連項目== *[[日本の古墳一覧]] *[[「稲荷」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]]
{{考古学}} {{DEFAULTSORT:ひようのつくにほんれつとうのこふんいちらん}} [[Category:日本の古墳一覧]] [[Category:日本史の一覧]]

revision.comment: Created page with "'''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Hyō"''' (「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧) This article provides a list of kofun (ancient burial mounds) and kofun clusters in the **Japanese Archipelago** whose names include **"Hyō"** (瓢 / ひさご), which refers to a **gourd**. == Overview == Throughout **Japan**, there are many kofun with names like **"Hyōtan-zuka"** (瓢箪塚 / ひょうたんづか, ひさごづか) and **"Hyōtan-yam..."

==概要== [[日本列島]]には「瓢箪塚」（ひょうたんづか/ひさごづか）や「瓢箪山」（ひょうたんやま/ひさごやま）を冠する古墳が数多く存在し、これ以外にも「瓢塚（ひょうづか/ひさごづか）」や「ひさご塚」・「ひさご山」など、「瓢」以下が異なるものや「瓢」を[[平仮名]]で書くものなど、様々な[[バリエーション]]が存在する。この名称は、[[前方後円墳]]または[[前方後方墳]]を側面から見た形状が[[瓢箪]]（ひさご/ひょうたん）に見立てられたことに由来するとされる。

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q123999885]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:20, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:51, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Hyō"''' (「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of kofun (ancient Kofuns) and kofun clusters in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Hyō"''' (瓢 / ひさご), which refers to a '''gourd'''.
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names like '''"Hyōtan-zuka"''' (瓢箪塚 / ひょうたんづか, ひさごづか) and '''"Hyōtan-yama"''' (瓢箪山 / ひょうたんやま, ひさごやま). In addition, there are variations such as '''"Hyō-zuka"''' (瓢塚 / ひょうづか, ひさごづか), '''"Hisago-zuka"''', and '''"Hisago-yama"''', as well as names where '''"Hyō"''' is written in '''hiragana'''. These names are believed to originate from the resemblance of '''keyhole-shaped kofun''' ('''zenpō-kōen-fun''') or '''square-fronted kofun''' ('''zenpō-kōhō-fun''') to a '''gourd (瓢箪, hisago / hyōtan)''' when viewed from the side.
== {{ill|Hyōtan-yama Kofun|ja|瓢箪山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-yama Kofun|qq=}} == * {{ill|Komaka Hyōtan-yama Kofun|ja|駒岡瓢箪山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Komaka Hyōtan-yama Kofun|qq=|1=Komaoka Hyōtan-yama Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119217988}} - Located in '''Tsurumi Ward, Yokohama City, Kanagawa Prefecture''', part of the '''Komaka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Hyōtan-yama Kofun (Kannami Town)|ja|瓢箪山古墳 (函南町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-yama Kofun (Kannami Town)|qq=|1=Hyōtan-yama Kofun (Kannami Town)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117337757}} - Located in '''Kannami Town, Tagata District, Shizuoka Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Moriyama Hyōtan-yama Kofun|ja|守山瓢箪山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriyama Hyōtan-yama Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579120}} - Located in '''Moriyama Ward, Nagoya City, Aichi Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Azuchi-Hyōtanyama Kofun|Azuchi Hyōtan-yama Kofun]] - Located in '''Ōmihachiman City, Shiga Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hyōtan-yama Kofun (Higashi-Osaka City)|ja|瓢箪山古墳 (東大阪市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-yama Kofun (Higashi-Osaka City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Higashi-Osaka City, Osaka Prefecture''', part of the '''Yamahata Kofun Cluster'''. * [[:en:Saki Hyōtanyama Kofun|Saki Hyōtan-yama Kofun]] - Located in '''Nara City, Nara Prefecture''', part of the '''Saki Tatenami Kofun Cluster'''.

[[Category:Lists_of_Kofun_in_Japan]] [[Category:Japan history-related lists]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[ja:「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] {{wikidata link|Q123999885}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q123999885]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:20, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:51, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Hyō"''' (「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of kofun (ancient Kofuns) and kofun clusters in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Hyō"''' (瓢 / ひさご), which refers to a '''gourd'''.
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names like '''"Hyōtan-zuka"''' (瓢箪塚 / ひょうたんづか, ひさごづか) and '''"Hyōtan-yama"''' (瓢箪山 / ひょうたんやま, ひさごやま). In addition, there are variations such as '''"Hyō-zuka"''' (瓢塚 / ひょうづか, ひさごづか), '''"Hisago-zuka"''', and '''"Hisago-yama"''', as well as names where '''"Hyō"''' is written in '''hiragana'''. These names are believed to originate from the resemblance of '''keyhole-shaped kofun''' ('''zenpō-kōen-fun''') or '''square-fronted kofun''' ('''zenpō-kōhō-fun''') to a '''gourd (瓢箪, hisago / hyōtan)''' when viewed from the side.

[[Category:Lists_of_Kofun_in_Japan]] [[Category:Japan history-related lists]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[ja:「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] {{wikidata link|Q123999885}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q123999885]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:20, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:51, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Hyō"''' (「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of kofun (ancient Kofuns) and kofun clusters in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Hyō"''' (瓢 / ひさご), which refers to a '''gourd'''.
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names like '''"Hyōtan-zuka"''' (瓢箪塚 / ひょうたんづか, ひさごづか) and '''"Hyōtan-yama"''' (瓢箪山 / ひょうたんやま, ひさごやま). In addition, there are variations such as '''"Hyō-zuka"''' (瓢塚 / ひょうづか, ひさごづか), '''"Hisago-zuka"''', and '''"Hisago-yama"''', as well as names where '''"Hyō"''' is written in '''hiragana'''. These names are believed to originate from the resemblance of '''keyhole-shaped kofun''' ('''zenpō-kōen-fun''') or '''square-fronted kofun''' ('''zenpō-kōhō-fun''') to a '''gourd (瓢箪, hisago / hyōtan)''' when viewed from the side.

== {{ill|Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|ja|瓢箪塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|qq=}} == * {{ill|Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Mooka City)|ja|瓢箪塚古墳 (真岡市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Mooka City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579124}} - Located in '''Mooka City, Tochigi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Komori Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|ja|小森瓢箪塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Komori Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Shiroi City, Chiba Prefecture'''{{sfn|Takahana|2005}}. * {{ill|Yamasaki Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|ja|山崎ひょうたん塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamasaki Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|1=Yamasaki Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97754529}} - Located in '''Sakura City, Chiba Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Ebina City)|ja|瓢箪塚古墳 (海老名市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Ebina City)|1=Hisagozuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q110814750}} - Located in '''Ebina City, Kanagawa Prefecture''', part of the '''Kamihamada Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Hyōtan-zuka (Kobirasawa Kofun)|ja|小平沢古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-zuka (Kobirasawa Kofun)|1=Kodairazawa Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11460737}} - Located in '''Kōfu City, Yamanashi Prefecture''', an alternate name for '''Kobirasawa Kofun'''. * {{ill|Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Shizuoka City)|ja|瓢箪塚古墳 (静岡市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Shizuoka City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579132}} - Located in '''Shimizu Ward, Shizuoka City, Shizuoka Prefecture''', part of the '''Nishinohara Kofun Cluster'''.

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q123999885]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:20, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:51, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Hyō"''' (「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of kofun (ancient Kofuns) and kofun clusters in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Hyō"''' (瓢 / ひさご), which refers to a '''gourd'''.
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names like '''"Hyōtan-zuka"''' (瓢箪塚 / ひょうたんづか, ひさごづか) and '''"Hyōtan-yama"''' (瓢箪山 / ひょうたんやま, ひさごやま). In addition, there are variations such as '''"Hyō-zuka"''' (瓢塚 / ひょうづか, ひさごづか), '''"Hisago-zuka"''', and '''"Hisago-yama"''', as well as names where '''"Hyō"''' is written in '''hiragana'''. These names are believed to originate from the resemblance of '''keyhole-shaped kofun''' ('''zenpō-kōen-fun''') or '''square-fronted kofun''' ('''zenpō-kōhō-fun''') to a '''gourd (瓢箪, hisago / hyōtan)''' when viewed from the side.
== {{ill|Hyōtan-yama Kofun|ja|瓢箪山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-yama Kofun|qq=}} == * {{ill|Komaka Hyōtan-yama Kofun|ja|駒岡瓢箪山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Komaka Hyōtan-yama Kofun|1=Komaoka Hyōtan-yama Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119217988}} - Located in '''Tsurumi Ward, Yokohama City, Kanagawa Prefecture''', part of the '''Komaka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Hyōtan-yama Kofun (Kannami Town)|ja|瓢箪山古墳 (函南町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-yama Kofun (Kannami Town)|1=Hyōtan-yama Kofun (Kannami Town)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117337757}} - Located in '''Kannami Town, Tagata District, Shizuoka Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Moriyama Hyōtan-yama Kofun|ja|守山瓢箪山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriyama Hyōtan-yama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579120}} - Located in '''Moriyama Ward, Nagoya City, Aichi Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Azuchi-Hyōtanyama Kofun|Azuchi Hyōtan-yama Kofun]] - Located in '''Ōmihachiman City, Shiga Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hyōtan-yama Kofun (Higashi-Osaka City)|ja|瓢箪山古墳 (東大阪市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-yama Kofun (Higashi-Osaka City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Higashi-Osaka City, Osaka Prefecture''', part of the '''Yamahata Kofun Cluster'''. * [[:en:Saki Hyōtanyama Kofun|Saki Hyōtan-yama Kofun]] - Located in '''Nara City, Nara Prefecture''', part of the '''Saki Tatenami Kofun Cluster'''.
== {{ill|Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|ja|瓢箪塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|qq=}} == * {{ill|Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Mooka City)|ja|瓢箪塚古墳 (真岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Mooka City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579124}} - Located in '''Mooka City, Tochigi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Komori Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|ja|小森瓢箪塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Komori Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Shiroi City, Chiba Prefecture'''{{sfn|Takahana|2005}}. * {{ill|Yamasaki Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|ja|山崎ひょうたん塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamasaki Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|1=Yamasaki Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97754529}} - Located in '''Sakura City, Chiba Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Ebina City)|ja|瓢箪塚古墳 (海老名市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Ebina City)|1=Hisagozuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q110814750}} - Located in '''Ebina City, Kanagawa Prefecture''', part of the '''Kamihamada Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Hyōtan-zuka (Kobirasawa Kofun)|ja|小平沢古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-zuka (Kobirasawa Kofun)|1=Kodairazawa Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11460737}} - Located in '''Kōfu City, Yamanashi Prefecture''', an alternate name for '''Kobirasawa Kofun'''. * {{ill|Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Shizuoka City)|ja|瓢箪塚古墳 (静岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Shizuoka City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579132}} - Located in '''Shimizu Ward, Shizuoka City, Shizuoka Prefecture''', part of the '''Nishinohara Kofun Cluster'''.
== Other Kofun == * {{ill|Hyōzuka Kofun (Kakegawa City)|ja|瓢塚古墳 (掛川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōzuka Kofun (Kakegawa City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579006}} - Located in '''Kakegawa City, Shizuoka Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Shiramizu Hyōzuka Kofun|ja|白水瓢塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiramizu Hyōzuka Kofun|1=Shiramizu Hisagozuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97173015}} - Located in '''Kobe City, Hyōgo Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Yoro Hyōzuka Kofun|ja|丁瓢塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoro Hyōzuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 瓢塚古墳 (姫路市)|1=Hisagozuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q48764117}} - Located in '''Himeji City, Hyōgo Prefecture''', part of the '''Yoro Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Hisago-yama Kofun|ja|瓢山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hisago-yama Kofun|1=Hisagoyama Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q116370450}} - Located in '''Shōbara City, Hiroshima Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hisago-zuka Kofun (Kannonji City)|ja|ひさご塚古墳 (観音寺市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hisago-zuka Kofun (Kannonji City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579010}} - Located in '''Kannonji City, Kagawa Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hyōzuka Kofun (Karatsu City)|ja|瓢塚古墳 (唐津市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōzuka Kofun (Karatsu City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579014}} - Located in '''Karatsu City, Saga Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hisago-zuka Kofun|ja|ひさご塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hisago-zuka Kofun|1=Hisago-zuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11276192}} - Located in '''Higashisonogi Town, Higashisonogi District, Nagasaki Prefecture'''.

[[Category:Lists_of_Kofun_in_Japan]] [[Category:Japan history-related lists]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[ja:「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] {{wikidata link|Q123999885}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q123999885]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:20, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:51, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Hyō"''' (「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of kofun (ancient Kofuns) and kofun clusters in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Hyō"''' (瓢 / ひさご), which refers to a '''gourd'''.
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names like '''"Hyōtan-zuka"''' (瓢箪塚 / ひょうたんづか, ひさごづか) and '''"Hyōtan-yama"''' (瓢箪山 / ひょうたんやま, ひさごやま). In addition, there are variations such as '''"Hyō-zuka"''' (瓢塚 / ひょうづか, ひさごづか), '''"Hisago-zuka"''', and '''"Hisago-yama"''', as well as names where '''"Hyō"''' is written in '''hiragana'''. These names are believed to originate from the resemblance of '''keyhole-shaped kofun''' ('''zenpō-kōen-fun''') or '''square-fronted kofun''' ('''zenpō-kōhō-fun''') to a '''gourd (瓢箪, hisago / hyōtan)''' when viewed from the side.

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q123999885]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:20, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:51, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Hyō"''' (「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of kofun (ancient Kofuns) and kofun clusters in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Hyō"''' (瓢 / ひさご), which refers to a '''gourd'''.
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names like '''"Hyōtan-zuka"''' (瓢箪塚 / ひょうたんづか, ひさごづか) and '''"Hyōtan-yama"''' (瓢箪山 / ひょうたんやま, ひさごやま). In addition, there are variations such as '''"Hyō-zuka"''' (瓢塚 / ひょうづか, ひさごづか), '''"Hisago-zuka"''', and '''"Hisago-yama"''', as well as names where '''"Hyō"''' is written in '''hiragana'''. These names are believed to originate from the resemblance of '''keyhole-shaped kofun''' ('''zenpō-kōen-fun''') or '''square-fronted kofun''' ('''zenpō-kōhō-fun''') to a '''gourd (瓢箪, hisago / hyōtan)''' when viewed from the side.
== {{ill|Hyōtan-yama Kofun|ja|瓢箪山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-yama Kofun|qq=}} == * {{ill|Komaka Hyōtan-yama Kofun|ja|駒岡瓢箪山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Komaka Hyōtan-yama Kofun|1=Komaoka Hyōtan-yama Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119217988}} - Located in '''Tsurumi Ward, Yokohama City, Kanagawa Prefecture''', part of the '''Komaka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Hyōtan-yama Kofun (Kannami Town)|ja|瓢箪山古墳 (函南町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-yama Kofun (Kannami Town)|1=Hyōtan-yama Kofun (Kannami Town)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117337757}} - Located in '''Kannami Town, Tagata District, Shizuoka Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Moriyama Hyōtan-yama Kofun|ja|守山瓢箪山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriyama Hyōtan-yama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579120}} - Located in '''Moriyama Ward, Nagoya City, Aichi Prefecture'''. * [[:en:Azuchi-Hyōtanyama Kofun|Azuchi Hyōtan-yama Kofun]] - Located in '''Ōmihachiman City, Shiga Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hyōtan-yama Kofun (Higashi-Osaka City)|ja|瓢箪山古墳 (東大阪市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-yama Kofun (Higashi-Osaka City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Higashi-Osaka City, Osaka Prefecture''', part of the '''Yamahata Kofun Cluster'''. * [[:en:Saki Hyōtanyama Kofun|Saki Hyōtan-yama Kofun]] - Located in '''Nara City, Nara Prefecture''', part of the '''Saki Tatenami Kofun Cluster'''.
== {{ill|Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|ja|瓢箪塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|qq=}} == * {{ill|Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Mooka City)|ja|瓢箪塚古墳 (真岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Mooka City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579124}} - Located in '''Mooka City, Tochigi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Komori Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|ja|小森瓢箪塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Komori Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Shiroi City, Chiba Prefecture'''{{sfn|Takahana|2005}}. * {{ill|Yamasaki Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|ja|山崎ひょうたん塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamasaki Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|1=Yamasaki Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97754529}} - Located in '''Sakura City, Chiba Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Ebina City)|ja|瓢箪塚古墳 (海老名市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Ebina City)|1=Hisagozuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q110814750}} - Located in '''Ebina City, Kanagawa Prefecture''', part of the '''Kamihamada Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Hyōtan-zuka (Kobirasawa Kofun)|ja|小平沢古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-zuka (Kobirasawa Kofun)|1=Kodairazawa Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11460737}} - Located in '''Kōfu City, Yamanashi Prefecture''', an alternate name for '''Kobirasawa Kofun'''. * {{ill|Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Shizuoka City)|ja|瓢箪塚古墳 (静岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Shizuoka City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579132}} - Located in '''Shimizu Ward, Shizuoka City, Shizuoka Prefecture''', part of the '''Nishinohara Kofun Cluster'''.
== Other Kofun == * {{ill|Hyōzuka Kofun (Kakegawa City)|ja|瓢塚古墳 (掛川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōzuka Kofun (Kakegawa City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579006}} - Located in '''Kakegawa City, Shizuoka Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Shiramizu Hyōzuka Kofun|ja|白水瓢塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiramizu Hyōzuka Kofun|1=Shiramizu Hisagozuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97173015}} - Located in '''Kobe City, Hyōgo Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Yoro Hyōzuka Kofun|ja|丁瓢塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoro Hyōzuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 瓢塚古墳 (姫路市)|1=Hisagozuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q48764117}} - Located in '''Himeji City, Hyōgo Prefecture''', part of the '''Yoro Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Hisago-yama Kofun|ja|瓢山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hisago-yama Kofun|1=Hisagoyama Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q116370450}} - Located in '''Shōbara City, Hiroshima Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hisago-zuka Kofun (Kannonji City)|ja|ひさご塚古墳 (観音寺市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hisago-zuka Kofun (Kannonji City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579010}} - Located in '''Kannonji City, Kagawa Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hyōzuka Kofun (Karatsu City)|ja|瓢塚古墳 (唐津市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōzuka Kofun (Karatsu City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579014}} - Located in '''Karatsu City, Saga Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hisago-zuka Kofun|ja|ひさご塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hisago-zuka Kofun|1=Hisago-zuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11276192}} - Located in '''Higashisonogi Town, Higashisonogi District, Nagasaki Prefecture'''.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q123999885]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:20, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:51, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Hyō"''' (「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of kofun (ancient Kofuns) and kofun clusters in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Hyō"''' (瓢 / ひさご), which refers to a '''gourd'''.
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names like '''"Hyōtan-zuka"''' (瓢箪塚 / ひょうたんづか, ひさごづか) and '''"Hyōtan-yama"''' (瓢箪山 / ひょうたんやま, ひさごやま). In addition, there are variations such as '''"Hyō-zuka"''' (瓢塚 / ひょうづか, ひさごづか), '''"Hisago-zuka"''', and '''"Hisago-yama"''', as well as names where '''"Hyō"''' is written in '''hiragana'''. These names are believed to originate from the resemblance of '''keyhole-shaped kofun''' ('''zenpō-kōen-fun''') or '''square-fronted kofun''' ('''zenpō-kōhō-fun''') to a '''gourd (瓢箪, hisago / hyōtan)''' when viewed from the side.

revision.comment: v25: Convert interwiki links [[:en:...]] to {{ill}} templates
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q123999885]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:20, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:51, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Hyō"''' (「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of kofun (ancient Kofuns) and kofun clusters in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Hyō"''' (瓢 / ひさご), which refers to a '''gourd'''.
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names like '''"Hyōtan-zuka"''' (瓢箪塚 / ひょうたんづか, ひさごづか) and '''"Hyōtan-yama"''' (瓢箪山 / ひょうたんやま, ひさごやま). In addition, there are variations such as '''"Hyō-zuka"''' (瓢塚 / ひょうづか, ひさごづか), '''"Hisago-zuka"''', and '''"Hisago-yama"''', as well as names where '''"Hyō"''' is written in '''hiragana'''. These names are believed to originate from the resemblance of '''keyhole-shaped kofun''' ('''zenpō-kōen-fun''') or '''square-fronted kofun''' ('''zenpō-kōhō-fun''') to a '''gourd (瓢箪, hisago / hyōtan)''' when viewed from the side.
== {{ill|Hyōtan-yama Kofun|ja|瓢箪山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-yama Kofun|qq=}} == * {{ill|Komaka Hyōtan-yama Kofun|ja|駒岡瓢箪山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Komaka Hyōtan-yama Kofun|1=Komaoka Hyōtan-yama Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119217988}} - Located in '''Tsurumi Ward, Yokohama City, Kanagawa Prefecture''', part of the '''Komaka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Hyōtan-yama Kofun (Kannami Town)|ja|瓢箪山古墳 (函南町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-yama Kofun (Kannami Town)|1=Hyōtan-yama Kofun (Kannami Town)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117337757}} - Located in '''Kannami Town, Tagata District, Shizuoka Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Moriyama Hyōtan-yama Kofun|ja|守山瓢箪山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriyama Hyōtan-yama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579120}} - Located in '''Moriyama Ward, Nagoya City, Aichi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Azuchi-Hyōtanyama Kofun|en|Azuchi-Hyōtanyama Kofun|WD=Q11450459|lt=Azuchi Hyōtan-yama Kofun}} - Located in '''Ōmihachiman City, Shiga Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hyōtan-yama Kofun (Higashi-Osaka City)|ja|瓢箪山古墳 (東大阪市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-yama Kofun (Higashi-Osaka City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Higashi-Osaka City, Osaka Prefecture''', part of the '''Yamahata Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Saki Hyōtanyama Kofun|en|Saki Hyōtanyama Kofun|WD=Q11383488|lt=Saki Hyōtan-yama Kofun}} - Located in '''Nara City, Nara Prefecture''', part of the '''Saki Tatenami Kofun Cluster'''.
== {{ill|Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|ja|瓢箪塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|qq=}} == * {{ill|Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Mooka City)|ja|瓢箪塚古墳 (真岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Mooka City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579124}} - Located in '''Mooka City, Tochigi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Komori Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|ja|小森瓢箪塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Komori Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Shiroi City, Chiba Prefecture'''{{sfn|Takahana|2005}}. * {{ill|Yamasaki Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|ja|山崎ひょうたん塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamasaki Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|1=Yamasaki Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97754529}} - Located in '''Sakura City, Chiba Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Ebina City)|ja|瓢箪塚古墳 (海老名市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Ebina City)|1=Hisagozuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q110814750}} - Located in '''Ebina City, Kanagawa Prefecture''', part of the '''Kamihamada Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Hyōtan-zuka (Kobirasawa Kofun)|ja|小平沢古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-zuka (Kobirasawa Kofun)|1=Kodairazawa Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11460737}} - Located in '''Kōfu City, Yamanashi Prefecture''', an alternate name for '''Kobirasawa Kofun'''. * {{ill|Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Shizuoka City)|ja|瓢箪塚古墳 (静岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Shizuoka City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579132}} - Located in '''Shimizu Ward, Shizuoka City, Shizuoka Prefecture''', part of the '''Nishinohara Kofun Cluster'''.
== Other Kofun == * {{ill|Hyōzuka Kofun (Kakegawa City)|ja|瓢塚古墳 (掛川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōzuka Kofun (Kakegawa City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579006}} - Located in '''Kakegawa City, Shizuoka Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Shiramizu Hyōzuka Kofun|ja|白水瓢塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiramizu Hyōzuka Kofun|1=Shiramizu Hisagozuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97173015}} - Located in '''Kobe City, Hyōgo Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Yoro Hyōzuka Kofun|ja|丁瓢塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoro Hyōzuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 瓢塚古墳 (姫路市)|1=Hisagozuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q48764117}} - Located in '''Himeji City, Hyōgo Prefecture''', part of the '''Yoro Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Hisago-yama Kofun|ja|瓢山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hisago-yama Kofun|1=Hisagoyama Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q116370450}} - Located in '''Shōbara City, Hiroshima Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hisago-zuka Kofun (Kannonji City)|ja|ひさご塚古墳 (観音寺市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hisago-zuka Kofun (Kannonji City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579010}} - Located in '''Kannonji City, Kagawa Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hyōzuka Kofun (Karatsu City)|ja|瓢塚古墳 (唐津市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōzuka Kofun (Karatsu City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579014}} - Located in '''Karatsu City, Saga Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hisago-zuka Kofun|ja|ひさご塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hisago-zuka Kofun|1=Hisago-zuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11276192}} - Located in '''Higashisonogi Town, Higashisonogi District, Nagasaki Prefecture'''.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]]
'''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Hyō"''' (「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of kofun (ancient Kofuns) and kofun clusters in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Hyō"''' (瓢 / ひさご), which refers to a '''gourd'''.
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names like '''"Hyōtan-zuka"''' (瓢箪塚 / ひょうたんづか, ひさごづか) and '''"Hyōtan-yama"''' (瓢箪山 / ひょうたんやま, ひさごやま). In addition, there are variations such as '''"Hyō-zuka"''' (瓢塚 / ひょうづか, ひさごづか), '''"Hisago-zuka"''', and '''"Hisago-yama"''', as well as names where '''"Hyō"''' is written in '''hiragana'''. These names are believed to originate from the resemblance of '''keyhole-shaped kofun''' ('''zenpō-kōen-fun''') or '''square-fronted kofun''' ('''zenpō-kōhō-fun''') to a '''gourd (瓢箪, hisago / hyōtan)''' when viewed from the side.
== {{ill|Hyōtan-yama Kofun|ja|瓢箪山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-yama Kofun|qq=}} == * {{ill|Komaka Hyōtan-yama Kofun|ja|駒岡瓢箪山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Komaka Hyōtan-yama Kofun|1=Komaoka Hyōtan-yama Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119217988}} - Located in '''Tsurumi Ward, Yokohama City, Kanagawa Prefecture''', part of the '''Komaka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Hyōtan-yama Kofun (Kannami Town)|ja|瓢箪山古墳 (函南町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-yama Kofun (Kannami Town)|1=Hyōtan-yama Kofun (Kannami Town)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117337757}} - Located in '''Kannami Town, Tagata District, Shizuoka Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Moriyama Hyōtan-yama Kofun|ja|守山瓢箪山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriyama Hyōtan-yama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579120}} - Located in '''Moriyama Ward, Nagoya City, Aichi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Azuchi-Hyōtanyama Kofun|en|Azuchi-Hyōtanyama Kofun|WD=Q11450459|lt=Azuchi Hyōtan-yama Kofun}} - Located in '''Ōmihachiman City, Shiga Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hyōtan-yama Kofun (Higashi-Osaka City)|ja|瓢箪山古墳 (東大阪市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-yama Kofun (Higashi-Osaka City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Higashi-Osaka City, Osaka Prefecture''', part of the '''Yamahata Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Saki Hyōtanyama Kofun|en|Saki Hyōtanyama Kofun|WD=Q11383488|lt=Saki Hyōtan-yama Kofun}} - Located in '''Nara City, Nara Prefecture''', part of the '''Saki Tatenami Kofun Cluster'''.
== {{ill|Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|ja|瓢箪塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|qq=}} == * {{ill|Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Mooka City)|ja|瓢箪塚古墳 (真岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Mooka City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579124}} - Located in '''Mooka City, Tochigi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Komori Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|ja|小森瓢箪塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Komori Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Shiroi City, Chiba Prefecture'''{{sfn|Takahana|2005}}. * {{ill|Yamasaki Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|ja|山崎ひょうたん塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamasaki Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|1=Yamasaki Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97754529}} - Located in '''Sakura City, Chiba Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Ebina City)|ja|瓢箪塚古墳 (海老名市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Ebina City)|1=Hisagozuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q110814750}} - Located in '''Ebina City, Kanagawa Prefecture''', part of the '''Kamihamada Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Hyōtan-zuka (Kobirasawa Kofun)|ja|小平沢古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-zuka (Kobirasawa Kofun)|1=Kodairazawa Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11460737}} - Located in '''Kōfu City, Yamanashi Prefecture''', an alternate name for '''Kobirasawa Kofun'''. * {{ill|Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Shizuoka City)|ja|瓢箪塚古墳 (静岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Shizuoka City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579132}} - Located in '''Shimizu Ward, Shizuoka City, Shizuoka Prefecture''', part of the '''Nishinohara Kofun Cluster'''.

revision.comment: adding dummy category to make categories work
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]]
'''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Hyō"''' (「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of kofun (ancient Kofuns) and kofun clusters in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Hyō"''' (瓢 / ひさご), which refers to a '''gourd'''.
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names like '''"Hyōtan-zuka"''' (瓢箪塚 / ひょうたんづか, ひさごづか) and '''"Hyōtan-yama"''' (瓢箪山 / ひょうたんやま, ひさごやま). In addition, there are variations such as '''"Hyō-zuka"''' (瓢塚 / ひょうづか, ひさごづか), '''"Hisago-zuka"''', and '''"Hisago-yama"''', as well as names where '''"Hyō"''' is written in '''hiragana'''. These names are believed to originate from the resemblance of '''keyhole-shaped kofun''' ('''zenpō-kōen-fun''') or '''square-fronted kofun''' ('''zenpō-kōhō-fun''') to a '''gourd (瓢箪, hisago / hyōtan)''' when viewed from the side.
== {{ill|Hyōtan-yama Kofun|ja|瓢箪山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-yama Kofun|qq=}} == * {{ill|Komaka Hyōtan-yama Kofun|ja|駒岡瓢箪山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Komaka Hyōtan-yama Kofun|1=Komaoka Hyōtan-yama Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119217988}} - Located in '''Tsurumi Ward, Yokohama City, Kanagawa Prefecture''', part of the '''Komaka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Hyōtan-yama Kofun (Kannami Town)|ja|瓢箪山古墳 (函南町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-yama Kofun (Kannami Town)|1=Hyōtan-yama Kofun (Kannami Town)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117337757}} - Located in '''Kannami Town, Tagata District, Shizuoka Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Moriyama Hyōtan-yama Kofun|ja|守山瓢箪山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriyama Hyōtan-yama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579120}} - Located in '''Moriyama Ward, Nagoya City, Aichi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Azuchi-Hyōtanyama Kofun|en|Azuchi-Hyōtanyama Kofun|WD=Q11450459|lt=Azuchi Hyōtan-yama Kofun}} - Located in '''Ōmihachiman City, Shiga Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hyōtan-yama Kofun (Higashi-Osaka City)|ja|瓢箪山古墳 (東大阪市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-yama Kofun (Higashi-Osaka City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Higashi-Osaka City, Osaka Prefecture''', part of the '''Yamahata Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Saki Hyōtanyama Kofun|en|Saki Hyōtanyama Kofun|WD=Q11383488|lt=Saki Hyōtan-yama Kofun}} - Located in '''Nara City, Nara Prefecture''', part of the '''Saki Tatenami Kofun Cluster'''.
== {{ill|Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|ja|瓢箪塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|qq=}} == * {{ill|Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Mooka City)|ja|瓢箪塚古墳 (真岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Mooka City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579124}} - Located in '''Mooka City, Tochigi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Komori Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|ja|小森瓢箪塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Komori Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Shiroi City, Chiba Prefecture'''{{sfn|Takahana|2005}}. * {{ill|Yamasaki Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|ja|山崎ひょうたん塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamasaki Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|1=Yamasaki Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97754529}} - Located in '''Sakura City, Chiba Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Ebina City)|ja|瓢箪塚古墳 (海老名市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Ebina City)|1=Hisagozuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q110814750}} - Located in '''Ebina City, Kanagawa Prefecture''', part of the '''Kamihamada Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Hyōtan-zuka (Kobirasawa Kofun)|ja|小平沢古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-zuka (Kobirasawa Kofun)|1=Kodairazawa Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11460737}} - Located in '''Kōfu City, Yamanashi Prefecture''', an alternate name for '''Kobirasawa Kofun'''. * {{ill|Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Shizuoka City)|ja|瓢箪塚古墳 (静岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Shizuoka City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579132}} - Located in '''Shimizu Ward, Shizuoka City, Shizuoka Prefecture''', part of the '''Nishinohara Kofun Cluster'''.
== Other Kofun == * {{ill|Hyōzuka Kofun (Kakegawa City)|ja|瓢塚古墳 (掛川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōzuka Kofun (Kakegawa City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579006}} - Located in '''Kakegawa City, Shizuoka Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Shiramizu Hyōzuka Kofun|ja|白水瓢塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiramizu Hyōzuka Kofun|1=Shiramizu Hisagozuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97173015}} - Located in '''Kobe City, Hyōgo Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Yoro Hyōzuka Kofun|ja|丁瓢塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoro Hyōzuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 瓢塚古墳 (姫路市)|1=Hisagozuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q48764117}} - Located in '''Himeji City, Hyōgo Prefecture''', part of the '''Yoro Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Hisago-yama Kofun|ja|瓢山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hisago-yama Kofun|1=Hisagoyama Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q116370450}} - Located in '''Shōbara City, Hiroshima Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hisago-zuka Kofun (Kannonji City)|ja|ひさご塚古墳 (観音寺市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hisago-zuka Kofun (Kannonji City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579010}} - Located in '''Kannonji City, Kagawa Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hyōzuka Kofun (Karatsu City)|ja|瓢塚古墳 (唐津市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōzuka Kofun (Karatsu City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579014}} - Located in '''Karatsu City, Saga Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hisago-zuka Kofun|ja|ひさご塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hisago-zuka Kofun|1=Hisago-zuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11276192}} - Located in '''Higashisonogi Town, Higashisonogi District, Nagasaki Prefecture'''.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]]
'''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Hyō"''' (「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of kofun (ancient Kofuns) and kofun clusters in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Hyō"''' (瓢 / ひさご), which refers to a '''gourd'''.
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names like '''"Hyōtan-zuka"''' (瓢箪塚 / ひょうたんづか, ひさごづか) and '''"Hyōtan-yama"''' (瓢箪山 / ひょうたんやま, ひさごやま). In addition, there are variations such as '''"Hyō-zuka"''' (瓢塚 / ひょうづか, ひさごづか), '''"Hisago-zuka"''', and '''"Hisago-yama"''', as well as names where '''"Hyō"''' is written in '''hiragana'''. These names are believed to originate from the resemblance of '''keyhole-shaped kofun''' ('''zenpō-kōen-fun''') or '''square-fronted kofun''' ('''zenpō-kōhō-fun''') to a '''gourd (瓢箪, hisago / hyōtan)''' when viewed from the side.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧]]
'''List of Kofun in the Japanese Archipelago with the Name "Hyō"''' (「瓢」の付く日本列島の古墳一覧)
This article provides a list of kofun (ancient Kofuns) and kofun clusters in the '''Japanese Archipelago''' whose names include '''"Hyō"''' (瓢 / ひさご), which refers to a '''gourd'''.
== Overview == Throughout '''Japan''', there are many kofun with names like '''"Hyōtan-zuka"''' (瓢箪塚 / ひょうたんづか, ひさごづか) and '''"Hyōtan-yama"''' (瓢箪山 / ひょうたんやま, ひさごやま). In addition, there are variations such as '''"Hyō-zuka"''' (瓢塚 / ひょうづか, ひさごづか), '''"Hisago-zuka"''', and '''"Hisago-yama"''', as well as names where '''"Hyō"''' is written in '''hiragana'''. These names are believed to originate from the resemblance of '''keyhole-shaped kofun''' ('''zenpō-kōen-fun''') or '''square-fronted kofun''' ('''zenpō-kōhō-fun''') to a '''gourd (瓢箪, hisago / hyōtan)''' when viewed from the side.
== {{ill|Hyōtan-yama Kofun|ja|瓢箪山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-yama Kofun|qq=}} == * {{ill|Komaka Hyōtan-yama Kofun|ja|駒岡瓢箪山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Komaka Hyōtan-yama Kofun|1=Komaoka Hyōtan-yama Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119217988}} - Located in '''Tsurumi Ward, Yokohama City, Kanagawa Prefecture''', part of the '''Komaka Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Hyōtan-yama Kofun (Kannami Town)|ja|瓢箪山古墳 (函南町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-yama Kofun (Kannami Town)|1=Hyōtan-yama Kofun (Kannami Town)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117337757}} - Located in '''Kannami Town, Tagata District, Shizuoka Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Moriyama Hyōtan-yama Kofun|ja|守山瓢箪山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriyama Hyōtan-yama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579120|1=Q135579120}} - Located in '''Moriyama Ward, Nagoya City, Aichi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Azuchi-Hyōtanyama Kofun|en|Azuchi-Hyōtanyama Kofun|WD=Q11450459|lt=Azuchi Hyōtan-yama Kofun|1=Azuchi-Hyōtanyama Kofun}} - Located in '''Ōmihachiman City, Shiga Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hyōtan-yama Kofun (Higashi-Osaka City)|ja|瓢箪山古墳 (東大阪市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-yama Kofun (Higashi-Osaka City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Higashi-Osaka City, Osaka Prefecture''', part of the '''Yamahata Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Saki Hyōtanyama Kofun|en|Saki Hyōtanyama Kofun|WD=Q11383488|lt=Saki Hyōtan-yama Kofun|1=Saki Hyōtanyama Kofun}} - Located in '''Nara City, Nara Prefecture''', part of the '''Saki Tatenami Kofun Cluster'''.
== {{ill|Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|ja|瓢箪塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|qq=}} == * {{ill|Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Mooka City)|ja|瓢箪塚古墳 (真岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Mooka City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579124|1=Q135579124}} - Located in '''Mooka City, Tochigi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Komori Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|ja|小森瓢箪塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Komori Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in '''Shiroi City, Chiba Prefecture'''{{sfn|Takahana|2005}}. * {{ill|Yamasaki Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|ja|山崎ひょうたん塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamasaki Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|1=Q97754529|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97754529}} - Located in '''Sakura City, Chiba Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Ebina City)|ja|瓢箪塚古墳 (海老名市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Ebina City)|1=Hisago-tsuka Kofun (Ebina)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q110814750}} - Located in '''Ebina City, Kanagawa Prefecture''', part of the '''Kamihamada Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Hyōtan-zuka (Kobirasawa Kofun)|ja|小平沢古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-zuka (Kobirasawa Kofun)|1=Kodairazawa Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11460737}} - Located in '''Kōfu City, Yamanashi Prefecture''', an alternate name for '''Kobirasawa Kofun'''. * {{ill|Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Shizuoka City)|ja|瓢箪塚古墳 (静岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-zuka Kofun (Shizuoka City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579132|1=Q135579132}} - Located in '''Shimizu Ward, Shizuoka City, Shizuoka Prefecture''', part of the '''Nishinohara Kofun Cluster'''.
== Other Kofun == * {{ill|Hyōzuka Kofun (Kakegawa City)|ja|瓢塚古墳 (掛川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōzuka Kofun (Kakegawa City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579006|1=Hisagozuka Kofun (Kakegawa)}} - Located in '''Kakegawa City, Shizuoka Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Shiramizu Hyōzuka Kofun|ja|白水瓢塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiramizu Hyōzuka Kofun|1=Shiramizu Hisagozuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97173015}} - Located in '''Kobe City, Hyōgo Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Yoro Hyōzuka Kofun|ja|丁瓢塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoro Hyōzuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 瓢塚古墳 (姫路市)|1=Hisagozuka Kofun (Himeji)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q48764117}} - Located in '''Himeji City, Hyōgo Prefecture''', part of the '''Yoro Kofun Cluster'''. * {{ill|Hisago-yama Kofun|ja|瓢山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hisago-yama Kofun|1=Hisagoyama Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q116370450}} - Located in '''Shōbara City, Hiroshima Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hisago-zuka Kofun (Kannonji City)|ja|ひさご塚古墳 (観音寺市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hisago-zuka Kofun (Kannonji City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579010|1=Hisagozuka Kofun (Kan'onji)}} - Located in '''Kannonji City, Kagawa Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hyōzuka Kofun (Karatsu City)|ja|瓢塚古墳 (唐津市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōzuka Kofun (Karatsu City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579014|1=Hisagozuka Kofun (Karatsu)}} - Located in '''Karatsu City, Saga Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Hisago-zuka Kofun|ja|ひさご塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hisago-zuka Kofun|1=Hisagozuka Kofun (Higashisonogi)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11276192}} - Located in '''Higashisonogi Town, Higashisonogi District, Nagasaki Prefecture'''.
